title: Momonosuke Faces Wano’s Future
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, King as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, now, IGARAM!! Don't just barge in without knocking!! Princess VIVI is dressing!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I suppose I jumped to Conclu- sions.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hmm... I have an uneasy feeling.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was so certain that Princess VIVI would want to sail on with them...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't you think it's a bit tight, terracotta?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's perfect! You look every inch a princess!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But your speech isn't scheduled until ten o'clock.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They've been waiting two years for your coming- of-age ceremony.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Normally it would've been conducted when you were 14.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: But I don't know what to say.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You don't have to say anything, my dear.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All you have to do is let everyone see how you've grown.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The ceremony celebrates your passage from child to adult.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...for his majesty to do this now.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I don't know anyone named that.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't do it. It could be some kind of trap.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hello?! Hello?! ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 46 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
